title: Goat's Milk Cheese Roll
excerpt: Albert Maritz is, in my eyes, the best male actor in South Africa. The two of us have known each other for a long time, but when it comes to our work we don't always see eye to eye. Having him in my kitchen made my heart glad.

seo.title: Goat's Milk Cheese Roll - Marinda Kook

html: Albert Maritz is, in my eyes, the best male actor in South Africa. The two of us have known each other for a long time, but when it comes to our work we don't always see eye to eye. Having him in my kitchen made my heart glad.

steps: Put the chives, all the herbs, the garlic and the salt and pepper in a bowl and mix. Set aside 60 ml to later roll the cheese in.
Add the lemon zest to the herb mixture.
Mix the soft goat's milk cheese into the herb mixture in the bowl.
Shape the cheese mixture into a sausage on a baking tray lined with cling film, and wrap it tightly in the cling film. Put it in the fridge for 30 minutes.
Pour the rest of the herb mixture and the pecan nuts onto a sheet of baking paper and roll the cheese sausage in the nuts until it's coated all the way round.
Sprinkle with olive oil before eating.
